blended.narrative: Telluride is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 7 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 8,403 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 7 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Tomorrow: 5" of snow, highs of 40°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 2.1" of snow, highs of 35°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
